Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Assistente responsabile prenotazioni (m/l/g) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura di modellamento: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noiSei la voce del nostro hotel: sia per telefono che per e-mail, crei offerte irresistibili, confermi le prenotazioni e garantisci che i follow-up siano gestiti con precisione, il tutto in linea con gli standard LHW e ISO. Pensi in termini di occupazione e opportunità: mantieni il nostro piano di prenotazioni accurato e aggiornato, contribuendo attivamente all'utilizzo ottimale del nostro inventario delle camere. Dai vita ai numeri: in stretta collaborazione con l'Executive Assistant Manager e il Front Office Manager, sviluppi previsioni e report essenziali per la pianificazione quotidiana. Sei meticoloso con i dati: i profili degli ospiti e i database sono gestiti con cura e discrezione: struttura e conformità fanno parte del tuo DNA. Sei al passo con i tempi: dalla gestione del sistema Channel Manager al perfezionamento continuo dei nostri standard ISO e RIMS, garantisci operazioni fluide e porti nuove idee sul tavolo. Trasformi il potenziale in prestazioni: l'upselling è più di un compito per te: è un modo per migliorare il viaggio degli ospiti e creare un valore aggiunto significativo. Perché unirsi a noi? Perché farai parte di uno degli hotel più rinomati della Svizzera: un luogo in cui non solo lavori, ma contribuisci a plasmare il futuro. Sarai circondato da professionisti appassionati e sperimenterai una cultura di squadra definita da eleganza, autenticità e collaborazione. Questo sei tu Background professionale: hai completato la formazione professionale nel settore dell'ospitalità o in un settore commerciale - idealmente nell'ambito dell'ospitalità di lusso - e offri diversi anni di esperienza rilevante. Mentalità di vendita: comprendi cosa guida le decisioni di prenotazione e come migliorare l'esperienza degli ospiti attraverso la vendita strategica delle camere. Competenze linguistiche: Parli e scrivi fluentemente in tedesco e inglese; la conoscenza aggiuntiva del francese o dell'italiano costituisce un vantaggio. Compostezza e chiarezza: sia sotto pressione che nella comunicazione diretta con l'ospite, rimani professionale, efficiente e cordiale. Spinta e orientamento alla crescita: sei desideroso non solo di soddisfare le aspettative, ma di migliorare i processi e investire nel tuo sviluppo. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Impiegato d'ufficio - Steward (inizia immediatamente) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura dello shaping: questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi. Cerchiamo un supporto energico per il nostro moderno ristorante per il personale, Capricorn, che è stato costruito poco meno di un anno fa. Tu sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, garantendo non solo una pulizia impeccabile ma anche supportando attivamente il nostro team di cucina nelle preparazioni culinarie. I tuoi compiti: Supporto in cucina: assisti attivamente nei lavori di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale delle verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: garantisci pulizia e organizzazione impeccabili nella nostra cucina moderna e nel back office del ristorante Capricorn. Gestione attenta: sei responsabile della pulizia, della cura e della conservazione precise dei prodotti porcellane, bicchieri, posate e utensili da cucina (pentole e padelle). Coordinamento e organizzazione: lavori a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e di servizio per garantire operazioni senza intoppi, anche durante le ore di punta. Questo sei tuEsperienza professionale: porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente alberghiero a 4 o 5 stelle. Interesse per le arti culinarie: ti piace maneggiare ingredienti freschi e sei felice di supportare il team nella preparazione del cibo. Competenze linguistiche: comunichi con sicurezza in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e capacità di lavorare bene in squadra. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e ti piace lavorare all'interno di un team motivato. Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Contattaci T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Ascoltaci Iscriviti Link Colophon
descriptionByLocale.de: Wäschemitarbeiter (Teilzeit 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50 %. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-Monats-Vertrag. Stellenantritt: 10.06.2026. ## Das bewegen Sie mit uns Im Grand Hotel Kronenhof legen wir Wert auf höchste Qualität – auch bei unserer Bettwäsche. Da unsere Textilien in der professionellen Wäscherei unseres Partnerhotels Kulm gereinigt werden, suchen wir eine organisierte Person, die in Pontresina für einen reibungslosen Arbeitsablauf und die Qualitätssicherung vor Ort sorgt. Was Sie bei uns erreichen: Logistikmanagement: Sie koordinieren den täglichen Wäschefluss (verschmutzt/sauber) zwischen dem Kronenhof und der Wäscherei Kulm. Qualitätskontrolle: Sie überprüfen eingehende Wäsche auf Sauberkeit und Vollständigkeit und stellen so sicher, dass unsere hohen Standards stets eingehalten werden. Bestandsverwaltung: Sie organisieren die Lagerung von Bodenwäsche, Uniformen und Gästewäsche und stellen sicher, dass alle Abteilungen pünktlich beliefert werden. Kommunikation: Sie sind der direkte Ansprechpartner für das Wäschereiteam im Kulm Hotel und kümmern sich souverän um betriebliche Details. Kleinere Reparaturen: Bei Bedarf kümmerst du dich um einfache Näharbeiten oder Reparaturen an Uniformen und Textilien. ## Das ist Ihr Organisationstalent: Sie behalten auch bei großen Wäschemengen den Überblick und arbeiten strukturiert und effizient. Qualitätsbewusstsein: Du hast ein Gespür für Textilien und erkennst sofort, wenn etwas nicht unseren 5-Sterne-Anforderungen entspricht. Zuverlässigkeit: Pünktlichkeit und die nötige körperliche Ausdauer im Umgang mit Wäschewagen sind für Sie selbstverständlich. Teamplayer: Du kommunizierst freundlich und klar – sowohl intern mit dem Housekeeping als auch extern mit den Kollegen im Kulm. Sprachkenntnisse: Gute Englisch- und Deutsch- oder Italienischkenntnisse sind für die Koordination und Dokumentation unerlässlich. ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche leben wir unsere Kultur: dezenten Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer Gestaltungskultur zu werden: Das bewegen Sie mit uns. Sie sind die Stimme unseres Hotels: Ob per Telefon oder E-Mail, Sie erstellen überzeugende Angebote, bestätigen Buchungen und sorgen für eine präzise Abwicklung von Folgeanfragen – alles im Einklang mit den LHW- und ISO-Standards. Sie denken in Bezug auf Belegung und Chancen: Sie halten unseren Reservierungsplan korrekt und aktuell und tragen aktiv zur optimalen Auslastung unseres Zimmerbestands bei. Sie erwecken Zahlen zum Leben: In enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem Executive Assistant Manager und Als Front Office Manager erarbeiten Sie Prognosen und Berichte, die für die tägliche Planung unerlässlich sind. Sie gehen akribisch mit Daten um: Gästeprofile und Datenbanken werden mit Sorgfalt und Diskretion gepflegt – Struktur und Compliance sind Teil Ihrer DNA. Sie bleiben der Zeit voraus: Von der Verwaltung des Channel-Manager-Systems bis zur kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung unserer ISO- und RIMS-Standards – Sie sorgen für reibungslose Abläufe und bringen frische Ideen ein. Sie verwandeln Potenzial in Leistung: Upselling ist für Sie mehr als eine Aufgabe – es ist eine Möglichkeit, die Gästereise zu verbessern und einen sinnvollen Mehrwert zu schaffen. Warum Kommst du zu uns? Denn Sie werden Teil eines der renommiertesten Hotels der Schweiz – ein Ort, an dem Sie nicht nur arbeiten, sondern die Zukunft mitgestalten. Sie sind von leidenschaftlichen Profis umgeben und erleben eine Teamkultur, die von Eleganz, Authentizität und Zusammenarbeit geprägt ist. Das sind SieBeruflicher Hintergrund: Sie verfügen über eine abgeschlossene Berufsausbildung in der Gastronomie oder einem kaufmännischen Bereich – idealerweise im Luxus-Gastgewerbe – und bringen mehrjährige einschlägige Erfahrung mit. Verkaufsmentalität: Sie verstehen, was Buchungsentscheidungen beeinflusst und wie Sie das Gästeerlebnis durch strategische Zimmerverkäufe verbessern können. Sprachkenntnisse: Sie sprechen und schreiben fließend Deutsch und Englisch; zusätzliche Französisch- oder Italienischkenntnisse sind von Vorteil. Gelassenheit & Klarheit: Ob unter Druck oder in der direkten Gästekommunikation, Sie bleiben professionell, effizient und herzlich. Antrieb und Wachstumsorientierung: Sie möchten nicht nur die Erwartungen erfüllen, sondern auch Prozesse verbessern und in Ihre eigene Entwicklung investieren. VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Büroangestellter - Steward (ab sofort) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800 m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche leben wir unsere Kultur: dezenten Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Das ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer Gestaltungskultur zu werden: Das bewegen Sie mit unsWir suchen tatkräftige Unterstützung für unser modernes Mitarbeiterrestaurant Capricorn, das vor knapp einem Jahr neu gebaut wurde. Du bist das Herzstück unserer Abläufe hinter den Kulissen und sorgst nicht nur für einwandfreie Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt auch aktiv unser Küchenteam bei den kulinarischen Zubereitungen. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei Vorbereitungsarbeiten (mise-en-place), wie dem fachgerechten Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen Vorbereitungsarbeiten. Ordnung und Sauberkeit: Du sorgst für einwandfreie Sauberkeit und Organisation in unserer modernen Küche sowie im Backoffice des Restaurants Capricorn. Sorgfältiger Umgang: Du bist verantwortlich für die Präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Porzellan, Glaswaren, Besteck und Küchenutensilien (Töpfe und Pfannen). Koordination und Organisation: Sie arbeiten eng mit den Küchen- und Serviceteams zusammen, um einen reibungslosen Betrieb zu gewährleisten – auch während der Stoßzeiten. Das sind SieBerufserfahrung: Sie bringen fundierte Erfahrung aus der Gastronomie mit, idealerweise aus einem 4- oder 5-Sterne-Hotelumfeld.Interesse an Kochkunst: Sie haben Freude am Umgang mit frischen Zutaten und unterstützen das Team gerne bei der Essenszubereitung.Sprachkenntnisse: Sie kommunizieren sicher auf Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch.Persönlichkeit: Sie zeichnen sich durch Flexibilität und Teamfähigkeit aus. Sie schätzen ein dynamisches Umfeld und arbeiten gerne in einem motivierten Team. VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Kontaktieren Sie uns T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Hören Sie von uns Abonnieren Links Impressum
descriptionByLocale.fr: Employé de linge (temps partiel 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Grisons). Pensée : 50 %. Vertrag : 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. ## C'est ce que vous déménagez chez nous Au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, nous accordons une grande importance à la qualité la plus élevée – et cela s'étend également à notre linge. Puisque nos textiles sont nettoyés dans la blanchisserie professionnelle de notre hôtel partenaire, le Kulm, nous recherchons une personne organisée pour assurer un flux de travail fluide et une assurance qualité sur place à Pontresina.Ce que vous réalisez avec nous :Gestion logistique : Vous coordonnez le flux quotidien de linge (sale/propre) entre le Kronenhof et la blanchisserie Kulm. Contrôle qualité : Vous inspectez le linge entrant pour en vérifier la propreté et l'intégralité, garantissant ainsi que nos normes élevées sont systématiquement respectées. Gestion des stocks : Vous organisez le stockage du linge de sol, des uniformes et du linge invité, en veillant à ce que tous les départements soient approvisionnés à temps. Communication : Vous êtes le point de contact direct de l'équipe de blanchisserie de l'hôtel Kulm et gérez les détails opérationnels en toute confiance. Petites réparations : Lorsque cela est nécessaire, vous vous occupez de tâches simples de couture ou de réparations d'uniformes et de textiles. ## C'est votre talent organisationnel : Vous gardez une vue d'ensemble même avec de gros volumes de linge et travaillez de manière structurée et efficace. Conscience de la qualité : Vous avez l'œil pour les textiles et reconnaissez immédiatement quand quelque chose ne répond pas à nos exigences 5 étoiles. Fiabilité : La ponctualité et l'endurance physique nécessaires à la manipulation des chariots à linge sont pour vous une évidence. Joueur d'équipe : Vous communiquez de manière amicale et claire, tant en interne avec Housekeeping qu'en externe avec vos collègues du Kulm. Compétences linguistiques : Une bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand ou de l'italien est essentielle pour la coordination et la documentation. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Porter Tournant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Transporter les bagages des invités à l'arrivée et au départ Nettoyer les chambres et les suites ainsi que les espaces publics Effectuer les courses et le déneigement en hiver Manipulation et entretien soigneux des machines et des équipements Soutenir les porteurs d'étage et participer aux réunions d'entretien ménager et aux sessions de formation Vous êtes Expérience professionnelle dans un poste similaire dans des hôtels de luxe Fiabilité et discrétion Passion pour le service et le plaisir du travail d'équipe Doit avoir : de bonnes compétences en allemand ou en anglais, idéalement des langues supplémentairesUne apparence soignée AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Vous êtes la voix de notre hôtel : que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous élaborez des offres attrayantes, confirmez les réservations et veillez à ce que les suivis soient traités avec précision, le tout conformément aux normes LHW et ISO. Office Manager, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne. Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données : les profils des clients et les bases de données sont gérés avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. nous ? Parce que vous ferez partie de l’un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne vous contentez pas de travailler, vous contribuez à façonner l’avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et ferez l’expérience d’une culture d’équipe définie par l’élégance, l’authenticité et la collaboration. C'est vousParcours professionnel : Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle dans l'hôtellerie ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe – et possédez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. Esprit de vente : vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment améliorer l'expérience client grâce à la vente stratégique de chambres. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment l'allemand et l'anglais ; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Calme et clarté : Que ce soit sous pression ou dans une communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation dynamisme et croissance : vous êtes désireux non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais également d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Employé de bureau - Steward (commencer immédiatement) (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant d'entreprise moderne, Capricorn, qui a été nouvellement construit il y a un peu moins d'un an. Vous êtes au cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, assurant non seulement une propreté irréprochable, mais soutenant également activement notre équipe de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires.Vos tâches :Soutien en cuisine : Vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise en place), tels que la découpe professionnelle des légumes et autres tâches préparatoires.Ordre et propreté : Vous assurez une propreté et une organisation sans faille dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le back-office du restaurant Capricorn.Manipulation soigneuse : Vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, entretien et stockage de la vaisselle, de la verrerie, des couverts et des ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles).Coordination et organisation : Vous travaillez en étroite collaboration avec les équipes de cuisine et de service pour assurer le bon fonctionnement, même pendant les heures de pointe. C'est vousExpérience professionnelle : Vous apportez une solide expérience dans le secteur de la gastronomie, idéalement issue d'un environnement hôtelier 4 ou 5 étoiles.Intérêt pour les arts culinaires : Vous aimez manipuler des ingrédients frais et êtes heureux de soutenir l'équipe dans la préparation des repas.Compétences linguistiques : Vous communiquez avec assurance en allemand, anglais ou italien.Personnalité : Vous vous caractérisez par votre flexibilité et votre capacité à bien travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez travailler au sein d’une équipe motivée. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Contactez-nous T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Écoutez-nous Abonnez-vous Liens Mentions légales

jobs.description:
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Employee Economat & Bike Lounge (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usSnack & Beverage Management: You maintain an overview and continuously restock snacks and drinks in our newly created Mountainbike Lounge.Inventory & Stock: You assist with receiving goods, organize incoming deliveries, and maintain order in the warehouse/storage room.Support: Occasional assistance with organizational tasks in the back office.
This is youProactive Mindset: You notice when a shelf is empty and take initiative independently.Reliability: Punctuality and a clean, organized way of working are second nature to you.Structure: You always keep track of where everything belongs, even in the warehouse.Languages: Italian or Portuguese, plus English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

T: 
                                                                
                                    +41 81 836 80 55

jobs.title: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

Backoffice-Koordination: Sie behalten den Überblick über Aufgaben, Termine und interne Kommunikation und sorgen so für einen reibungslosen Informationsfluss im Team. Qualitätssicherung: Sie helfen bei der Überwachung der eingesetzten Tools und Systeme und bringen Ideen zur Verbesserung des gesamten Gästeserviceangebots ein. Das sind Sie. Ein strukturierter, eigenverantwortlicher Arbeitsstil mit ausgeprägtem Sinn für Qualität, Diskretion und Zuverlässigkeit. Ausgezeichnete mündliche und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch – jede weitere Sprache, insbesondere Italienisch, ist von Vorteil. Eine Leidenschaft für Organisation, ausgeprägte digitale Fähigkeiten und ein sicherer Umgang mit MS Office-Anwendungen. Eine serviceorientierte Denkweise: Sie sehen sich als unterstützendes Teammitglied, das hinter den Kulissen arbeitet – und Sie wissen, dass herausragende Gästeerlebnisse auf einem hervorragenden Backoffice basieren. VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Kontaktieren Sie uns T: +41 81 836 80 55 E: people@kulmgroup.com ## Hören Sie von uns Abonnieren Links Impressum
descriptionByLocale.fr: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Grisons). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag : 10-Monats-Stelle / Contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01. ## C'est ce que vous faites avec nous Front Office & Guest : Gérer les arrivées tardives et les départs anticipés, fournir une assistance professionnelle aux clients par téléphone et répondre aux demandes spéciales des clients. Service de voiturier et de bagages : garer les véhicules des invités dans le garage et aider au service de bagages et de chambre. Audit de nuit : réalisation de la clôture quotidienne dans le système (Opera Cloud), audit des rapports des points de vente et gestion de la gestion physique des espèces pour le service comptable. Sécurité et contrôle : effectuer des rondes de sécurité régulières, surveiller le panneau d'alarme incendie et assurer la paix et la tranquillité nocturne dans l'ensemble des locaux. Préparation : Générer des rapports de service, acheter et publier des journaux et fournir des services de cirage de chaussures à nos invités. ## This is you Expérience : Une solide expérience dans le secteur hôtelier (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement une première expérience en équipe de nuit. Compétence informatique : Gestion en toute confiance des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications MS Office standard. Langues : Maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage non négligeable en raison de notre situation géographique et de notre clientèle. Engagement : Permis de conduire valide et condition physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité : Un sens élevé des responsabilités, une discrétion absolue et une apparence soignée qui répond à nos standards de luxe. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Vous êtes la voix de notre hôtel : que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous élaborez des offres attrayantes, confirmez les réservations et veillez à ce que les suivis soient traités avec précision, le tout conformément aux normes LHW et ISO. Office Manager, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne. Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données : les profils des clients et les bases de données sont gérés avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. nous ? Parce que vous ferez partie de l’un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne vous contentez pas de travailler, vous contribuez à façonner l’avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et ferez l’expérience d’une culture d’équipe définie par l’élégance, l’authenticité et la collaboration. C'est vousParcours professionnel : Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle dans l'hôtellerie ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe – et possédez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. Esprit de vente : vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment améliorer l'expérience client grâce à la vente stratégique de chambres. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment l'allemand et l'anglais ; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Calme et clarté : Que ce soit sous pression ou dans une communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation dynamisme et croissance : vous êtes désireux non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais également d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. jobs.description:
Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10.

## This is what you move with us
Cleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.
Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware.
Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.
Start: immediate

## This is you
Hospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.
Language Skills: German or English or Italian
Flexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.
Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.
This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Upholsterer (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with us  Aesthetics & Value      Preservation:      Maintenance and professional repairs throughout the hotel – from      upholstered furniture to wall coverings  Eye for Detail: Creating and managing defect      lists as well as proactively reporting damages  Coordination &      Communication:      Obtaining and negotiating quotes and collaborating with external      specialists  Technical Skills: Careful maintenance and      handling of machines and tools  Creating Atmosphere: Organizing and implementing      stylish holiday decorations in the hotelPlacing Orders with suppliers together with the Technical Manager
This is you  Ideally, completed training as an      upholsterer, interior decorator, or similar qualification   Experience in      maintaining and designing high-quality interiors  Ability to make independent      decisions in your area of expertise & handle emergencies      professionally  Language skills: Must-Have: Italian, plus German or English  Responsible, solution-oriented,      and passionate about stylish interior designStart: by agreement
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

We are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. Professional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.
Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.

Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.

Professional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.

jobs.title: Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.en:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Porter Tournant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Porter Tournant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter
Careful handling and maintenance of machines and equipment
Supporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions

## This is you
Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    50%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Contact us
T: 
                                                                
                                    +41 81 836 80 55
                                
                                                                    

                                                                                                                                E: 
                                                                
                                    people@kulmgroup.com

This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Reservations Agent  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Reservations Agent  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail 
  Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty 
  Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner 
  Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email 
  Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings 
  Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products

## This is you
Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests 
  Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment 
  Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations 
  Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage 
  Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels 
  Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
